channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Saquon Barkley sets Eagles franchise record with 255 yards rushing, 2 TDs in a 37-20 win over Rams
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — When Saquon Barkley glanced up at a SoFi Stadium replay of his latest huge run for the Philadelphia Eagles on Sunday night, he happened to see a graphic indicating he had 173 yards rushing — only 16 shy of what he knew to be his career high.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Who's No. 1? No. 2 UConn, No. 5 UCLA and No. 6 Notre Dame all have chance at top spot in AP poll
item.description: A wild weekend in Los Angeles set up for a new No. 1 in The Associated Press women's basketball poll when it's released Monday. The question is who will it be? Defending champion South Carolina has been No.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Broncos def. Raiders 29-19
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— The Denver Broncos overcame a sluggish start to secure a 29-19 win over the Las Vegas Raiders on Sunday, thanks to a second-half spark from quarterback Bo Nix.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: What the 49ers said after losing to the Packers
item.description: "They gave us an opportunity to get back in the game and then to have those three turnovers and all three led to touchdowns, 21 points," Kyle Shanahan said. "You top that with the penalties and stuff, that's how you get embarrassed like that.
item.dc:creator: Michael Nowels, The Mercury News

item.title: Chiefs' Patrick Mahomes fined over $14K for 'violent gesture' at Bills game
item.description: The fine comes after the star quarterback celebrated a touchdown pass with a hand gesture that appeared to imitate him holding a gun.
item.dc:creator: Olivia Johnson, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Josh Jacobs scores 3 touchdowns as Packers dominate injury-riddled 49ers
item.description: Green Bay Packers running back Josh Jacobs ran for three touchdowns for the first time in two years as the team barreled over the San Francisco 49ers, 38-10
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Patrick Mahomes and Chiefs win at the buzzer again, topping Panthers 30-27 on Shrader's field goal
item.description: Ten yards into a scramble, Patrick Mahomes could have easily slid for a first down or simply ducked out of bounds and moved on to the next play.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Maverick McNealy birdies the last hole at Sea Island to finally become PGA Tour winner
item.description: ST. SIMONS ISLAND, Ga. (AP) — Maverick McNealy has learned in his five years on the PGA Tour that trying to win a tournament is “designed to make you feel as uncomfortable as you possibly can.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sam Darnold leads game-winning drive in OT and Vikings beat Bears 30-27 after blowing late lead
item.description: Sam Darnold threw for 90 of his 330 yards in overtime to set up Parker Romo’s game-ending 29-yard field goal, and the Minnesota Vikings outlasted the Chicago Bears 30-27 after giving up 11 points in the final 22 seconds of regulation.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Seligman, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Thitikul finishes eagle-birdie to win CME Group Tour Championship and claim record $4M prize
item.description: NAPLES, Fla. (AP) — Down by two shots with two holes to play, Jeeno Thitikul knew exactly what was needed to capture the biggest prize in women's golf history. And another eagle-birdie finish — for the second straight day — made it happen.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jannik Sinner leads Italy past the Netherlands for its second consecutive Davis Cup title
item.description: MALAGA, Spain (AP) — Italy went nearly a quarter-century without winning the Davis Cup. Then along came Jannik Sinner, and now the country is celebrating its second consecutive title. The No.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kennesaw State beats No. 24 Rutgers 79-77 in program's 1st home game against ranked team
item.description: KENNESAW, Ga. (AP) — Jamil Miller had 16 points and 10 rebounds, and Kennesaw State dominated No. 24 Rutgers on Sunday and held on for a 79-77 win in the first home game against a ranked opponent in the program's history.
item.dc:creator: SEAN HOLOHAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: When Harbaugh brothers meet for 3rd time Monday, Archie Manning can relate to Jack Harbaugh
item.description: EL SEGUNDO, Calif. (AP) — Archie Manning can empathize with what Jack Harbaugh will be going through again on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Best of the West power rankings: Arizona State inches up, Boise State ticks down, Colorado slides and Oregon State reappears
item.description: The Sun Devils are the new No. 2 (behind Oregon) after beating BYU to move closer to the Big 12 championship game.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Appalachian State fans pelt James Madison players with snowballs before game
item.description: As the James Madison Dukes were entering the field from the tunnel, Appalachian State Mountaineer fans bombarded the players with snowballs.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Russell and Hamilton give Mercedes a 1-2 finish in Las Vegas
item.description: An ecstatic George Russell had just won the Formula 1 race Saturday night when he exclaimed in his radio, “Vegas!” He was ready to start celebrating in America's party capital, saying he would skip his flight back to his home in the United Kingdom to make the most of his Las Vegas Grand Prix victory
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utah HC busts out of offensive slump with 6-1 victory
item.description: PITTSBURGH (ABC4 Sports) - After getting shut out for the fifth time of the season, the Utah Hockey team scored a regulation-time season-high six goals in a 6-1 rout over the Pittsburgh Penguins Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Barnes leads Aggies to 41-20 win over SDSU
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - After a rough start to the season, Utah State is finishing strong. Bryson Barnes accounted for 323 yards and four touchdowns to lead Utah State over San Diego State 41-20 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Princely Umanmielen’s return to the Swamp ends with a loss and a police escort
item.description: GAINESVILLE, Fla. (AP) — Princely Umanmielen's return to the Swamp ended with a police escort. Umanmielen, who spent three years at Florida before transferring to Ole Miss, left the stadium with a number of officers surrounding him. And the defensive end still tried to get at heckling fans.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Markkanen scores 34 as Jazz beat Knicks, 121-106
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Lauri Markkanen had 34 points, Collin Sexton had four 3-pointers in the fourth quarter and the Utah Jazz ran past the New York Knicks 121-106 on Saturday to snap a four-game skid. Sexton finished 25 points and John Collins had 20 points and 13 rebounds forthe Jazz.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Florida knocks No. 9 Ole Miss out of College Football Playoff contention, 24-17 in the Swamp
item.description: Coach Billy Napier and his team did something no one at Florida had done in nearly two decades. It could be the turning point for a once-proud program that clearly slipped in recent years.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Andy Murray will coach Novak Djokovic through the Australian Open
item.description: The recently retired Andy Murray is going to team up with longtime rival Novak Djokovic as his coach, they both announced Saturday, with plans to prepare for — and work together through — the Australian Open in January.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Bulls host the Grizzlies in non-conference play
item.description: Memphis Grizzlies (9-7, ninth in the Western Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (7-10, seventh in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Grizzlies -5.5; over/under is 242.5 BOTTOM LINE: The Memphis Grizzlies visit the Chicago Bulls in a non-conference matchup.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Giannis gets triple-double as Bucks rout Pacers in NBA Cup
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Giannis Antetokounmpo had 37 points, 11 assists, and 10 rebounds for his second triple-double in his last four games, and the Milwaukee Bucks beat the Indiana Pacers 129-117 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Ohtani wins unanimous MVP after historic first season with Dodgers
item.description: Los Angeles Dodgers' superstar Shohei Ohtani is the 2024 National League Most Valuable Player. It was a unanimous decision to award the Japanese phenom the 2024 MVP, and in doing so, create another historic moment as he becomes the first full-time designated hitter to win it.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Aaron Judge earns second AL honor in 3 seasons
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Aaron Judge earned his second American League honor on Thursday. Judge led the major leagues with 58 homers, 144 RBIs, and 133 walks while hitting .322. When Judge won his first MVP award in 2022, he received 28 first-place votes while Ohtani got the other two.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Lynne Roberts leaves Utah for WNBA job
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In a shocking announcement Tuesday evening, Lynne Roberts is leaving the University of Utah women's basketball program to become the head coach of the Los Angeles Sparks of the WNBA.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Zach LaVine's 16 fourth-quarter points lead Bulls past Pistons 122-112
item.description: Zach LaVine scored 16 of his 25 points in the fourth quarter and the Chicago Bulls pulled away for a 122-112 win against the Detroit Pistons on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9
